barRaise.topFinding: Fifth cycle at needs-attention, same lone HIGH, now four days old: v0.98.10 is fully authored (GDD pill v0.98.10 at line 1380, paired changelog, and the roster-wide footprint rebalance in source/world3d/building_catalog_3d.gd) but still uncommitted, with HEAD (3918336) and project.godot config/version both stuck on v0.98.9 since 2026-06-15, so the commit-per-patch hard rule has stood violated four days and the FUSE-truncation-unacceptable files (GDD.html, project.godot) keep sitting dirty. The 06-19 canonical audit reads the GDD as well aligned and reduces open doc-drift to two coupled-to-v0.98.10 items: the structural defense worked-examples gap at GDD line 1654 (still cite pre-rebalance 1x1 footprints, contradict the line-1650 +1-if-2x2 rule, needs a balance decision before it lands) plus two new low drifts the rebalance left (roster count claim reads 38-building where the catalog has 37, and Field Triage now has three footprints: code 3x3, Assets tab 3x2, defense example 2x2). The three long-carried MEDIUMs (world_3d profiler baseline, the v0.80.1 stale ARCHITECTURE.md, the 2D-residual GDD drift) are unchanged a fifth cycle. Decide line 1654, run release.ps1 to land or revert v0.98.10, then a single doc-surface session clears the rest.

actions.title: Resolve the line-1654 worked-examples decision, then run `release.ps1` to commit + push (or revert) v0.98.10 so HEAD and config/version (0.98.9 -> 0.98.10) reconcile with the GDD pill and the dirty GDD.html / project.godot / building_catalog_3d.gd stop sitting exposed a fifth day.

Decide GDD line 1654 vs the line 1650 defense rule: keep authored defense and annotate the intentional below-rule cases, or re-derive defense from the new 2x2/3x3 footprints. Reconcile Field Triage to 3x3 at the worked example and the Assets-tab annotation (~line 2696) in the same pass. This is the gate on landing v0.98.10.

Do the one-pass 2D-residual GDD sweep carried since 06-16: era-stamp the M3 roadmap deliverables (~2083-2087), re-point the frame-tick rows (~4648/4726) and the tile-constant note (~4816), and re-point the three Design-tab Locked-Decision implementation pointers onto world_3d.gd.
Capture and log a world_3d profiler run at 1000-3000 enemies in docs/OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md before gameplay drives the 3D crowd; carried ~11 cycles and compounded by the footprint-density bump.

Refresh or retire docs/ARCHITECTURE.md off its v0.80.1 / 2D-stack snapshot and stop the GDD citing it as the synced source if retired; delete the stranded source/vfx/damage_number.gd(.uid) in the same pass.
